title: Igaram Sails as a Decoy
description: On pages 2–4, igaram sails as a decoy as the crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is.
scene: Igaram Sails as a Decoy. The crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.
